subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Wronged One unto him who hath partaken of the Choice Sealed Wine and drawn nigh unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اخذه رحیقی المختوم و قربه الی الله المهیمن القیوم انه
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @praise and encouragement, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
